phases.name: Foundation - shadcn/ui Setup
phases.description: Install and configure shadcn/ui on Vite + React project. Install all 17+ UI components via CLI. Configure Tailwind with shadcn theme, CSS variables, path aliases. This phase must be 100% solid before any UI work.

subtasks.description: Run shadcn init for Vite + React. This configures components.json, installs clsx/tailwind-merge/tailwindcss-animate/class-variance-authority, creates lib/utils.ts with cn(), updates tailwind.config.js with shadcn theme extensions and tailwindcss-animate plugin, and adds CSS variables to index.css (globals.css equivalent). Must use --style default --base-color slate --css-variables true flags or equivalent. Verify components.json points to @/components/ui path. NOTE: shadcn init may need special handling for Vite (not Next.js) - check if it detects Vite automatically or needs manual framework flag.

verification.command: cd apps/web && cat components.json && cat src/lib/utils.ts
verification.expected: components.json exists with aliases config, utils.ts exports cn() function using clsx + twMerge

subtasks.description: Install all 17 shadcn components via CLI in two batches. Batch 1: button card badge input label select dialog tabs tooltip table breadcrumb separator. Batch 2: sidebar alert-dialog collapsible sonner scroll-area. Each component creates a file in apps/web/src/components/ui/. Also install lucide-react as npm dependency. After install, verify all component files exist and are importable.

verification.expected: 17 or more .tsx files in components/ui directory

subtasks.description: Update main.tsx to wrap app with TooltipProvider (from shadcn tooltip, with delayDuration={0}) and add Toaster from sonner. Import index.css before App. Verify the app boots without errors. Structure: StrictMode > BrowserRouter > TooltipProvider > App + Toaster.

verification.expected: No type errors (or zero errors related to main.tsx)

subtasks.description: Verification subtask: Run npm run dev:web (or npm run dev in apps/web) and npm run build to confirm everything compiles. Check that importing a shadcn component like Button works: create a temporary test in App.tsx that renders <Button>Test</Button> and verify it shows styled correctly. Remove the test after verification. This confirms the entire shadcn pipeline works end-to-end (CSS variables, Tailwind config, component imports, path aliases).

verification.command: cd apps/web && npx tsc --noEmit && echo 'TypeCheck OK'

phases.name: App Shell + Layout + Routing
phases.description: Replace the manual AppShell.tsx with shadcn Sidebar. Create PageHeader component. Define all 8 routes. Wrap app in SidebarProvider. This gives us the full navigation skeleton.

subtasks.description: Create componentes/AppSidebar.tsx adapting from V0 app-sidebar.tsx. Use shadcn Sidebar component with collapsible='icon'. Two nav groups: 'Principal' (Dashboard /, Setores /setores, Colaboradores /colaboradores, Escala /setores - note: escala is per-setor now) and 'Configuracao' (Tipos de Contrato /tipos-contrato, Empresa /empresa). Use lucide-react icons: LayoutDashboard, Building2, Users, CalendarDays, FileText, Settings. Use react-router-dom Link (to=, NOT href=) with asChild on SidebarMenuButton. Use useLocation() for isActive (NOT usePathname). Logo in SidebarHeader: CalendarDays icon + 'EscalaFlow' + 'v2.0'. SidebarFooter with empresa name placeholder. CRITICAL CONVERSIONS from V0: Link href -> Link to, usePathname -> useLocation().pathname.

Create componentes/PageHeader.tsx adapting from V0 page-header.tsx. Props: breadcrumbs: {label: string, href?: string}[], actions?: ReactNode. Uses SidebarTrigger + Separator (vertical) + Breadcrumb components from shadcn. BreadcrumbLink must use react-router-dom Link (asChild with <Link to={href}>, NOT href= directly). Last breadcrumb item uses BreadcrumbPage (not a link). Actions slot on the right side. CRITICAL: BreadcrumbLink in shadcn renders an <a> tag by default - must use asChild + react-router-dom Link for SPA navigation.

Update App.tsx: Remove AppShell import and usage. Wrap with SidebarProvider + SidebarInset layout. AppSidebar goes outside SidebarInset. All Routes go inside SidebarInset. Define all 8 routes: / (Dashboard), /setores (SetorLista), /setores/:id (SetorDetalhe), /setores/:id/escala (EscalaPagina), /colaboradores (ColaboradorLista), /colaboradores/:id (ColaboradorDetalhe), /tipos-contrato (ContratoLista), /empresa (EmpresaConfig). For pages that don't exist yet, create placeholder components inline or import from placeholder files. Delete the old AppShell.tsx file.

verification.expected: OK - all routes compile, placeholder pages export named functions

subtasks.notes:
Create placeholder pages as simple exports: export function SetorDetalhe() { return
SetorDetalhe - em construcao
} etc. These will be properly implemented in Phase 4. DELETE apps/web/src/componentes/AppShell.tsx after updating App.tsx.

phases.name: Service Layer + State + Helpers
phases.description: Create the API wrapper, all 7 entity services, Zustand store, color constants, and formatters. This is the data layer that all pages depend on. Zero UI work - pure logic/data.

subtasks.description: Create servicos/api.ts with the fetch wrapper. Export ApiError class (extends Error, has status: number property) and api object with get/post/put/del methods. All methods call internal request<T> function that: sets Content-Type to application/json, throws ApiError on !res.ok (parsing body.error or fallback 'Erro desconhecido'), returns undefined for 204, otherwise returns res.json(). Base URL is '/api' (Vite proxy handles the rest). Also create hooks/useApiData.ts custom hook: useApiData<T>(fetcher: () => Promise<T>, deps: unknown[]) returning { data, loading, error, reload }. Uses useState + useEffect internally.

Create servicos/setores.ts and servicos/dashboard.ts. setoresService: listar(ativo?: boolean), buscar(id), criar(data), atualizar(id, data), deletar(id), listarDemandas(setorId), criarDemanda(setorId, data), atualizarDemanda(id, data), deletarDemanda(id), reordenarRank(setorId, colaboradorIds). dashboardService: resumo(). All typed with @escalaflow/shared types (Setor, Demanda, DashboardResumo, ReordenarRankRequest). Use api.get/post/put/del from api.ts.

Create servicos/colaboradores.ts and servicos/excecoes.ts. colaboradoresService: listar(params?: {setor_id?, ativo?}), buscar(id), criar(data), atualizar(id, data), deletar(id). excecoesService: listar(colaboradorId), criar(colaboradorId, data), atualizar(id, data), deletar(id). All typed with @escalaflow/shared types (Colaborador, CriarColaboradorRequest, Excecao). Query params for listar should be built as URLSearchParams.

Create servicos/escalas.ts, servicos/tipos-contrato.ts, and servicos/empresa.ts. escalasService: gerar(setorId, data), buscar(id), listarPorSetor(setorId, params?), oficializar(id), ajustar(id, data), deletar(id). tiposContratoService: listar(), buscar(id), criar(data), atualizar(id, data), deletar(id). empresaService: buscar(), atualizar(data). All typed with @escalaflow/shared (EscalaCompleta, GerarEscalaRequest, TipoContrato, Empresa).

Create estado/store.ts (Zustand store), lib/cores.ts (color constants), and lib/formatadores.ts (formatters). Zustand store: interface AppState { setorAtivoId: number | null, setSetorAtivo: (id: number | null) => void }. cores.ts: export CORES_STATUS_ESCALA, CORES_ALOCACAO, CORES_EXCECAO, CORES_VIOLACAO as defined in PRD (Tailwind class strings). formatadores.ts: formatarData(iso) -> '01/03/2026', formatarMinutos(min) -> '7h30', formatarMes(iso) -> 'Mar/2026', iniciais(nome) -> 'AJ' (first letter of first two words).

phases.name: Rewrite Existing Pages with shadcn
phases.description: Rewrite Dashboard, SetorLista, and ContratoLista using shadcn components and the service layer. Replace raw fetch() with services. Replace manual Tailwind with shadcn Card, Badge, Button, Dialog, Input, etc.

subtasks.description: Create componentes/StatusBadge.tsx - reusable component for escala status. Props: status: 'OFICIAL' | 'RASCUNHO' | 'SEM_ESCALA'. Uses Badge variant='outline' with colors from CORES_STATUS_ESCALA. OFICIAL shows CheckCircle2 icon + 'Oficial' in emerald. RASCUNHO shows Clock icon + 'Rascunho' in amber. SEM_ESCALA shows 'Sem Escala' in muted. Adapt from V0 Dashboard StatusBadge inline function. Also create componentes/PontuacaoBadge.tsx - shows pontuacao number with color-coded badge (emerald>=85, amber>=70, red<70) with appropriate icon (CheckCircle2, AlertTriangle, XCircle). Adapt from V0 escala page PontuacaoBadge.

Rewrite paginas/Dashboard.tsx with shadcn + service layer. Adapt from V0 app/page.tsx. Use dashboardService.resumo() via useApiData hook instead of raw fetch. 4 stat cards using Card+CardContent with lucide icons (Building2, Users, Palmtree, Stethoscope) in colored circles. Layout: grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 for stats, then grid lg:grid-cols-3 for content (setores lg:col-span-2 + alertas + acoes rapidas). Setores overview with StatusBadge, violation count badge, link to /setores/:id via react-router-dom Link. Alertas section with CircleAlert icons in amber cards. Acoes rapidas: 3 Button links (Gerar Escala -> /setores, Novo Colaborador -> /colaboradores, Novo Setor -> /setores). Add PageHeader with breadcrumbs=[{label:'Dashboard'}]. Loading state while fetching. CRITICAL: Use Link to= not href=.

verification.instructions: Navigate to / in browser. Should show 4 stat cards with real data from API (4 setores, 16 colaboradores, etc from seed), setores overview with status badges, alertas section, and quick actions. PageHeader shows 'Dashboard' breadcrumb. Sidebar visible and functional.

subtasks.description: Rewrite paginas/SetorLista.tsx with shadcn + service layer. Adapt from V0 app/setores/page.tsx. Use setoresService.listar() and colaboradoresService.listar() via useApiData. Toolbar: Input with Search icon (pl-9) + Button for toggling archived view with count. Grid of Cards (sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3), each showing Building2 icon + name + hours (Clock icon) + colaborador count (Users icon) + 'Abrir' button (Link to /setores/:id). Archived cards: opacity-70 + 'Arquivado' badge + 'Restaurar' button (calls setoresService.atualizar(id, {ativo:true}) + toast). Empty state with Building2 icon. Dialog for new setor: nome + hora abertura (time input) + hora fechamento (time input). On submit: setoresService.criar() + toast('Setor criado') + reload list. PageHeader: breadcrumbs=[{label:'Setores'}], actions=Novo Setor button. CRITICAL: Use react-router-dom Link, import toast from sonner.

verification.instructions: Navigate to /setores. Should show 4 setor cards from seed data with real collaborator counts. Search filters by name. 'Novo Setor' dialog opens and creates a real setor via API. Toast appears on success. Archived toggle works.

subtasks.description: Rewrite paginas/ContratoLista.tsx with shadcn + service layer. Use tiposContratoService.listar() via useApiData. Grid of Cards showing each tipo contrato with: nome (CardTitle), badges for horas_semanais (e.g. '44h/sem'), dias_trabalho ('6 dias'), trabalha_domingo ('Dom: Sim/Nao'), max_minutos_dia ('Max 600min/dia'). PageHeader: breadcrumbs=[{label:'Tipos de Contrato'}]. Loading state. Empty state if no contracts. Should display 4 contracts from seed data (CLT 44h, CLT 36h, CLT 30h, Estagiario 20h).

verification.instructions: Navigate to /tipos-contrato. Should show 4 contract type cards from seed data with name and metadata badges. PageHeader shows breadcrumb. Loading state shows briefly then resolves.

phases.name: New CRUD Pages
phases.description: Build the 5 new pages: SetorDetalhe, ColaboradorLista, ColaboradorDetalhe, EscalaPagina, EmpresaConfig. Each is a full CRUD page with forms, dialogs, and API integration.

subtasks.description: Implement paginas/EmpresaConfig.tsx (simplest new page). Adapt from V0 app/empresa/page.tsx. Use empresaService.buscar() via useApiData to load empresa data. Card with nome (Input), cidade (Input), estado (Input) - NOTE: real Empresa only has nome/cidade/estado, NOT corte_semanal/tolerancia like V0 mock. PageHeader: breadcrumbs=[{label:'Empresa'}], actions=Salvar button. On save: empresaService.atualizar({nome, cidade, estado}) + toast('Empresa atualizada'). Optionally show CLT rules read-only card (from V0 - just display, no editing). Use controlled form state with useState. Handle 404 case (empresa not configured yet - show empty form).

verification.instructions: Navigate to /empresa. Should load 'Supermercado Fernandes, Fortaleza, CE' from seed. Edit nome and save - toast shows. Reload confirms persistence.

subtasks.description: Implement paginas/ColaboradorLista.tsx. Adapt from V0 app/colaboradores/page.tsx. Use colaboradoresService.listar() and setoresService.listar(true) and tiposContratoService.listar() via useApiData. Toolbar: Search input + Select for setor filter (populated from setores API) + Archived toggle button with count. Grid of cards (sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3): avatar circle (initials, pink for F, sky for M) + name + setor name + badges (contrato name, hours, sexo, turno preference). 'Ver Perfil' button links to /colaboradores/:id. Dialog for new colaborador: nome + sexo (Select F/M) + setor (Select from API) + tipo contrato (Select from API). On submit: colaboradoresService.criar({nome, sexo, setor_id: parseInt(selected), tipo_contrato_id: parseInt(selected)}) + toast + reload. Archived toggle shows inativos with Restaurar button. IMPORTANT: Need to join setor name and contrato name client-side since API returns IDs only. Fetch setores+contratos to build lookup maps.

verification.instructions: Navigate to /colaboradores. Should show 16 colaborador cards from seed data. Search filters by name. Setor filter works. 'Novo Colaborador' dialog creates via API with toast. Cards show correct setor name and contrato name.

subtasks.description: Implement paginas/SetorDetalhe.tsx (WITHOUT drag-and-drop, that's a separate subtask). Adapt from V0 app/setores/[id]/page.tsx. Use useParams() to get id. Load setor via setoresService.buscar(id), demandas via setoresService.listarDemandas(id), colaboradores via colaboradoresService.listar({setor_id: id}), and latest escala via escalasService.listarPorSetor(id). PageHeader: breadcrumbs=[{label:'Setores', href:'/setores'}, {label: setor.nome}], actions=Salvar button. Card 'Info do Setor': nome + hora_abertura + hora_fechamento (controlled inputs). Card 'Demanda por Faixa': list of demand rows with hora_inicio-hora_fim + dia_semana badge + min_pessoas badge + edit/delete buttons. '+ Nova Faixa' button opens Dialog with dia_semana (Select, optional - null for all days), hora_inicio, hora_fim, min_pessoas (number). Create via setoresService.criarDemanda(). Delete via setoresService.deletarDemanda() with AlertDialog confirmation. Card 'Colaboradores': list sorted by rank with rank number + name + contrato badge + 'Ver perfil' link to /colaboradores/:id. GripVertical icon shown but DnD not wired yet. Button 'Gerenciar' links to /colaboradores. Card 'Escala Atual': show most recent escala status or 'Nenhuma escala'. Link to /setores/:id/escala. Save button: setoresService.atualizar(id, formData) + toast. IMPORTANT: V0 uses button size='icon-sm' which doesn't exist in standard shadcn - use size='icon' with className='h-7 w-7' instead.

verification.instructions: Navigate to /setores/1. Should show Caixa setor with info fields, 4 demand rows, 8 colaboradores list, escala card. Can create/delete demandas. Save updates setor info. Links to colaborador profiles and escala page work.

subtasks.description: Add drag-and-drop rank reordering to SetorDetalhe.tsx. Install @dnd-kit/core @dnd-kit/sortable @dnd-kit/utilities. In the Colaboradores card, wrap list with DndContext + SortableContext. Each colaborador row becomes a SortableItem using useSortable hook. GripVertical icon becomes the drag handle (use attributes/listeners from useSortable). On drag end: reorder the local list, then call setoresService.reordenarRank(setorId, newOrderIds) + toast. Rank badges (#1, #2...) update immediately on drag. If API fails, revert the order and show error toast.

verification.instructions: Navigate to /setores/1. Drag a colaborador by the grip icon to reorder. Rank numbers update. Check network tab: PUT /api/setores/1/rank fires with new colaborador_ids order. Toast shows 'Prioridade atualizada'.

subtasks.description: Implement paginas/ColaboradorDetalhe.tsx. Adapt from V0 app/colaboradores/[id]/page.tsx. Use useParams() for id. Load: colaborador via colaboradoresService.buscar(id), setores via setoresService.listar(true), tipos contrato via tiposContratoService.listar(), excecoes via excecoesService.listar(id). PageHeader: breadcrumbs=[{label:'Colaboradores', href:'/colaboradores'}, {label: colab.nome}], actions=Salvar. Card 'Info Pessoais': nome (Input), sexo (Select F/M), setor (Select from API). Card 'Contrato': tipo contrato (Select from API), horas semanais (Input number). Info box showing template details. Card 'Preferencias': prefere_turno (Select: none/MANHA/TARDE), evitar_dia_semana (Select: none + 7 dias). Helper text about soft constraints. Card 'Excecoes': list with ExcecaoIcon (Palmtree=FERIAS, Stethoscope=ATESTADO, Ban=BLOQUEIO) + date range + observacao + edit/delete. '+ Nova Excecao' Dialog: tipo (Select), data_inicio (date), data_fim (date), observacao (Input). Create via excecoesService.criar(). Delete with AlertDialog. Card 'Historico de Escalas': for now, placeholder text 'Historico sera exibido quando houver escalas' (computing stats from alocacoes is complex, defer to polish). Save: colaboradoresService.atualizar(id, formData) + toast. CRITICAL: V0 uses exc.nota but real Excecao type has 'observacao' field. V0 uses size='icon-sm' - use size='icon' + className='h-7 w-7'.

verification.instructions: Navigate to /colaboradores/1. Should show first colaborador with all info fields populated from API. Can change setor, contrato, preferences. Excecoes list shows if any. Can create/delete excecoes. Save persists changes.

phases.name: EscalaGrid + EscalaPagina (Core Product)
phases.description: Build the most important component: EscalaGrid (schedule visualization table) and the EscalaPagina with its 3 tabs (Simulacao, Oficial, Historico). This is the CORE of the product.

subtasks.description: Create componentes/EscalaGrid.tsx. Adapt from V0 components/escala-grid.tsx (330 lines). Props: { colaboradores: Colaborador[], alocacoes: Alocacao[], dataInicio: string, dataFim: string, demandas?: Demanda[], readOnly?: boolean, onCelulaClick?: (colaboradorId, data, statusAtual) => void }. Key features: (1) Weekly navigation with weekOffset state, weeks computed from date range (Monday start), Previous/Next week buttons. (2) Table header: sticky 'Colaborador' column + 7 day columns (day name + dd/mm) + 'Horas/sem' column. (3) Body rows: one per colaborador. Sticky left column with avatar (initials, pink=F sky=M) + short name + contrato name. 7 cells per day with color by status: TRABALHO (emerald-50), TRABALHO on Sunday (sky-100), FOLGA (muted/60), INDISPONIVEL (amber-50 - NOT 'AUSENCIA' like V0). Each cell wrapped in Tooltip showing details. Clickable if !readOnly. Hours/week column with total vs meta comparison. (4) Coverage footer row: 'COBERTURA' + count per day (actual workers vs min from demandas prop, green if met, amber if deficit). If no demandas prop, hide coverage row. (5) Legend: 4 status color swatches. CRITICAL PERFORMANCE: Build a Map<string, Alocacao> keyed by `${colaboradorId}-${data}` for O(1) lookup per cell instead of .find() which is O(n). CRITICAL V0 FIX: Replace all 'AUSENCIA' references with 'INDISPONIVEL'. Replace getNomeContrato mock with actual tipoContrato lookup (pass tipos as prop or resolve inline). CRITICAL: Use Button component for week nav instead of raw <button>.

verification.expected: No type errors. Component compiles with correct prop types using @escalaflow/shared types.

subtasks.description: Implement paginas/EscalaPagina.tsx - Tab Simulacao. Adapt from V0 app/escala/page.tsx. Use useParams() for setor id (route is /setores/:id/escala, NOT /escala like V0). Load setor via setoresService.buscar(id), colaboradores via colaboradoresService.listar({setor_id: id}), demandas via setoresService.listarDemandas(id). PageHeader: breadcrumbs=[{label:'Escala'}, {label: setor.nome}]. NO setor selector (setor comes from URL, unlike V0 which has a Select). Tabs component with 3 tabs: Simulacao (default), Oficial, Historico. Simulacao tab: Date range inputs (data_inicio, data_fim) + 'Gerar Escala' button. On click: set loading state, call escalasService.gerar(setorId, {data_inicio, data_fim}). On response: store escalaCompleta (escala + alocacoes + violacoes) in state. Show 5 indicator cards (Pontuacao with PontuacaoBadge, Cobertura %, Violacoes Hard count, Violacoes Soft count, Equilibrio %) - compute cobertura and equilibrio from alocacoes/demandas if not in response. Render EscalaGrid with real data. Violacoes section with Collapsible (or click-to-expand Card like V0): list violacoes with severidade-based styling (HARD=red, SOFT=amber) using XCircle/AlertTriangle icons. IMPORTANT: Use 'severidade' field NOT 'tipo' like V0. Actions: Oficializar button (escalasService.oficializar + toast), Exportar HTML (future), Imprimir (window.print()), Descartar (AlertDialog + escalasService.deletar + clear state).

verification.instructions: Navigate to /setores/1/escala. Click 'Gerar Escala' with date range. Grid appears with real schedule data from motor. Indicators show. Violacoes section expands. Oficializar changes status. Descartar clears the grid.

subtasks.description: Add Oficial and Historico tabs to EscalaPagina.tsx. Oficial tab: Load official escala via escalasService.listarPorSetor(id, {status:'OFICIAL'}). If exists (array has items), fetch full details via escalasService.buscar(escala.id) to get alocacoes. Show EscalaGrid in readOnly mode + escala info (period, pontuacao, oficializada date) + export/print buttons. If no official escala: empty state 'Nenhuma escala oficial. Gere na aba Simulacao.' with CalendarDays icon. Historico tab: Load archived escalas via escalasService.listarPorSetor(id, {status:'ARQUIVADA'}). List items with month label + date range + PontuacaoBadge + 'Arquivada' badge + 'Ver' button. On 'Ver' click: fetch full escala via escalasService.buscar(escalaId) and render EscalaGrid inline in readOnly mode (expand/collapse). Empty state if no archives.

verification.instructions: After generating and officializing an escala, switch to Oficial tab - grid shows in read-only. Generate another, officialize it (previous one archives). Check Historico tab - archived escala shows with 'Ver' expand.

phases.name: Polish + Integration
phases.description: Error handling, loading states, empty states, toast everywhere, error boundary, cross-page navigation verification, and final cleanup.

subtasks.description: Add toast notifications to ALL CRUD operations across all pages. Import { toast } from 'sonner'. Success toasts: 'Setor criado', 'Setor atualizado', 'Colaborador cadastrado', 'Colaborador salvo', 'Excecao criada', 'Excecao removida', 'Demanda criada', 'Demanda removida', 'Prioridade atualizada', 'Escala gerada', 'Escala oficializada', 'Escala descartada', 'Empresa atualizada'. Error toasts: catch ApiError and show toast.error(err.message) - messages come from backend in Portuguese. Add try/catch to every API call that currently might not have one. Check every page: Dashboard, SetorLista, SetorDetalhe, ColaboradorLista, ColaboradorDetalhe, EscalaPagina, ContratoLista, EmpresaConfig.

verification.instructions: Perform CRUD operations on every page. Every create/update/delete shows a toast. Intentionally cause an error (e.g. delete a tipo_contrato in use) - error toast appears with backend message.

subtasks.description: Add loading states and empty states to all pages. Loading: Each page should show 'Carregando...' text or a subtle spinner while data is being fetched (useApiData already has loading state - make sure each page uses it and renders appropriately). Empty states: When lists are empty (no setores, no colaboradores, no excecoes, no demandas, no escalas), show a centered icon (40px, muted color) + descriptive text + optional CTA button. Follow V0 empty state patterns: icon className='mb-3 size-10 text-muted-foreground/40' + text className='text-sm font-medium text-muted-foreground' + subtext className='mt-1 text-xs text-muted-foreground/70'. Ensure Dashboard handles zero-data gracefully.

verification.instructions: Slow network in DevTools: loading states visible. Delete all seed data or check with empty DB: empty states show properly on every page with appropriate icons and messages.

subtasks.description: Add AlertDialog confirmations for destructive actions and error boundary. Destructive actions needing AlertDialog: (1) Archive setor: 'O setor {nome} tem {N} colaboradores. Eles nao entrarao em novas escalas.' (2) Archive colaborador: 'Ao arquivar {nome}, ele nao sera incluido em novas escalas.' (3) Delete demanda: 'Remover esta faixa de demanda?' (4) Delete excecao: 'Remover esta excecao?' (5) Descartar escala: 'Descartar esta simulacao? A escala sera removida.' Add archive buttons to SetorDetalhe and ColaboradorDetalhe pages. Create a simple ErrorBoundary component (class component with componentDidCatch) that wraps the main content area in App.tsx, showing a 'Algo deu errado' message with a reload button. Create a simple NotFound page for invalid routes (catch-all Route path='*').

verification.instructions: Try to delete a demanda - AlertDialog asks for confirmation. Navigate to /setores/999 - shows not found page. Archive a setor from detail page - confirmation shows cascata warning.

subtasks.description: Cross-page navigation verification and final cleanup. Verify all navigation links work: Dashboard setor card -> /setores/:id, SetorDetalhe 'Ver perfil' -> /colaboradores/:id, SetorDetalhe 'Abrir Escala' -> /setores/:id/escala, ColaboradorDetalhe back breadcrumb -> /colaboradores, ColaboradorLista 'Ver Perfil' -> /colaboradores/:id, Dashboard 'Gerar Nova Escala' -> /setores (since escala is per-setor now), sidebar active states work for nested routes (/setores/:id highlights Setores). Clean up any remaining console.log, TODO comments, unused imports. Ensure all pages use consistent patterns: PageHeader at top, space-y-6 for cards, consistent button sizes. Delete AppShell.tsx if not already deleted. Final typecheck pass.

verification.command: cd apps/web && npx tsc --noEmit && echo 'TYPECHECK OK' && npm run build && echo 'BUILD OK'
verification.expected: TYPECHECK OK followed by BUILD OK - zero errors, zero warnings

execution_notes.parallel_phases: Phase 1 and Phase 2 can run in parallel (both depend only on Phase 0). Phase 4 and Phase 5 can run in parallel (both depend on Phase 3).
execution_notes.critical_path: Phase 0 -> Phase 1+2 -> Phase 3 -> Phase 5 (EscalaGrid is the product core)
highest_risk_subtasks: subtask-0-1 (shadcn init for Vite - may need manual config)
subtask-5-1 (EscalaGrid - 330+ lines, performance-critical, most complex component)
subtask-5-2 (EscalaPagina Simulacao - integrates grid + API + motor)
v0_gotchas: V0 uses 'AUSENCIA' status -> real API uses 'INDISPONIVEL'
V0 Violacao uses 'tipo' field -> real shared types use 'severidade'
V0 Empresa has corte_semanal/tolerancia -> real Empresa only has nome/cidade/estado
V0 uses button size='icon-sm' -> use size='icon' + className='h-7 w-7'
V0 uses Next.js Link href -> must use react-router-dom Link to
V0 uses usePathname() -> must use useLocation().pathname
V0 uses use(params) -> must use useParams()
V0 has 'use client' directives -> remove (everything is client in Vite)
V0 escala page has setor Select -> real EscalaPagina gets setor from URL params
V0 excecao has .nota field -> real Excecao has .observacao field
